questions.statement:
<p>Select the option that is related to the third number in the way as the second number is related to the first number and the sixth number is related to the fifth number.</p>

<p>32 : 192 :: 62 : ? :: 43 : 516</p>

<p>Identify the odd one:-</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/22/03/Pic63.png" style="width: 350px; height: 104px;" /></p>

<p>Select the letter-cluster from among the given options that can replace the question mark (?) in the following series.</p>

<p>UZM, QVQ, MRU, ?, EJC</p>

In a certain code language, &#39;It&#39;s your life&#39; is written as &#39;Ao Bo Co&#39; and &#39;It&#39;s your food&#39; is written as &#39;Ba Co Bo&#39;. How will &#39;food&#39; be written in that language?
The letters of the name of a fruit are T, R, F, G, U, R, P, A, E and I. If the letters are rearranged correctly, then what is the fifth letter of the word formed?

<p>Select the option that is related to the third number in the same way as the second number is related to the first number and the sixth number is related to the fifth number.</p>

<p>216 ∶ 180&nbsp;<span style="">∶∶</span> 343 <span style="">∶&nbsp;</span>?&nbsp;<span style="">∶∶</span> 512&nbsp;<span style="">∶</span> 448</p>

options: Both conclusions I and II follow&nbsp; /
Neither conclusion I nor II follows /
I is the cause and II is the effect. /
II is the cause and I is the effect. /
Both I and II are independent causes. /
Both I and II are effects of independent causes. /
questions.explanation: As Mantu Sweets has made advertisements about its sweets, a lot of people are aware of the sweets they sell and are more willing to buy their sweets. Having a look at the available options, we get, option 1 cannot be the answer as it calls that statement I is the cause and statement II is its effect which should be the other way around. Now we come to option 2, which establishes the relationship between both the statements in a clearer fashion. Options 3, 4 and 5 can easily be eliminated as they cannot be the possible answer because they fail to establish the cause-effect relationship.

questions.statement:
<p style="">Which number will replace the question mark (?) in the following number series?</p>

<p style="">9, 12, 17, 26, 43, 76, ?, 270</p>

options: Both I and II are True /
Either I or II are True /

questions.statement: Three of the following four letter-clusters are alike in a certain way and one is different. Pick the odd one out.
questions.explanation:
<p>Microsoft has released all three types of windows 7, 8, 10 except windows 9</p>
Hence windows 9 is correct answer.

questions.statement: In a row of 21 children facing North, Nitin is third to the right of Sita who is ninth from the right end of the row. What is Nitin&#39;s position from the left end?

<p>If &times; means &divide;, +&nbsp;means &times;, -&nbsp;means, +, &divide;&nbsp;means -, what will come in place of the question mark?</p>

<p>144 &times; 18 + 16 &divide; 23 - 41 = ?</p>

<p>In the following series of numbers, find out how many times, 2,6 and 8 have appeared together, 8 being in the middle, 2 and 6 on either sides of 8?</p>

<p><span style="">7 0 2 6 8 2 6 2 2 8 6 6 8 2 6 1 4 2 8 6 2 2 8 2 6 0 9 3</span></p>

Seven people, A, B, C, D, E, F and G, are sitting in a straight row, facing the north. Only two people sit to the left of G. Only two people sit between A and F. A sits to the left of F. D is an immediate neighbour of F to the right. Only one person sits to the right of B. E is not an immediate neighbour of G. Who sits to the immediate left of F?

<p>Select the <strong>correct</strong> option which is related to the third term in the same way as second term is related to the first.</p>

<p>Ecology : Environment : : Histology : ?</p>
In the following question, select the odd number pair from the given alternatives.

questions.explanation: The major reason why most of the Indian television shows have a similar storyline can be that most of the audience prefer watching such shows over other shows. Therefore, the first conclusion follows the given statement. When we come to the second conclusion, we find that there is no direct relation between the payment of the actors and the storyline of their shows. Therefore, it is clear that conclusion II does not follow. Hence, only conclusion I follows.

questions.statement:
